docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY KARIMI H AS TO DEFENDANT EMPIRE THEATRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
